name: Incel? Zandik
description:
To the person who took down the Incel Dottore bot: Bring him back, I liked to fix him and show him love. 💔💔💔

–｡✧｡–

Don't interact with this bot if you don't like this concept. I will show my man love in any shape or form. Even if he'll be a little stinky and even if it will require a bit more brutal force.

Idk how this bot will act. I made a backstory and stuff. Call me Bob the builder, because I just wanna fix him up and then have him love me for helping him. 😞

Carried him around like a princess when he got too annoying.
creator: ikapars
